arts.ttl: Villa interested in loan deal for Rashford
arts.sum: Aston Villa are one of a number of clubs interested in Manchester United's out-of-favour striker Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Aston Villa confirm huge £65m striker transfer
arts.sum: Duran joined Villa from Chicago Fire in January 2023 in a deal worth up to £18m and made a total of 78 appearances for the club, scoring 20 goals. The Colombia international scored winners against West Ham, Leicester City and Everton to help Villa make a strong start to their league campaign, before bagging a memorable goal against Bayern Munich in the club's first home match in Europe's elite club competition for over 40 years.

arts.ttl: Duran completes move from Villa to Saudi
arts.sum: Aston Villa forward Jhon Duran has completed a £64m move to Saudi Pro League club Al Nassr.

arts.ttl: Duran completes £65m Saudi move from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Striker Jhon Duran joins Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr for a reported £65m from Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Jhon Durán joins Ronaldo at Al Nassr from Villa
arts.sum: Jhon Durán has completed his transfer from Aston Villa to Al Nassr as the Saudi Pro League side look to bolster their forward line for the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Sources: Aston Villa interested in Rashford deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa are interested in signing Marcus Rashford before the transfer deadline, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Team News: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery and Ollie Watkins have agreed on Aston Villa transfer as Arsenal decision imminent
arts.sum: "I'm not sure my grandad or uncle Baz are going to be too happy," he added after scoring against Mikel Arteta's Arsenal side for Villa, having transferred earlier that year. Ollie Watkins has been unable to escape comments he made during his time at Brentford amid ongoing transfer speculation over the Aston Villa striker.

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about Watkins' future, transfer distractions and injuries
arts.sum: “Tomorrow, I am not thinking to rest with the players maybe because they are tired, I am thinking to choose the best players we have, and resting, having good food, preparing the game tomorrow, respecting them, and playing 90 minutes at 100%.” “I don’t think how we are playing matches in a row with the demands we have, I don’t think it should be an excuse, because if we want to increase our level, if we want to fight or to compete in the level we are now, we have to accept, we have to adapt.

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Villa fined after mass confrontation
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Newcastle United are fined by the Football Association for their part in a mass confrontation during their Premier League game at St James' Park on 26 December.
